sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115907" key="yuxoliph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῡχο-λῐπής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n115907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lifeless,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βρέφος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:227" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">227</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δύναμις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.266</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
